mano_cua.result_summary: 页面完全白屏崩溃。Console 报错 Uncaught ReferenceError: React is not defined（_root.tsx:4）。无任何 UI 元素渲染，无错误边界提示。应用完全无法使用。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Page shows complete white screen crash. Console error: Uncaught ReferenceError: React is not defined at _root.tsx:4. No UI elements rendered, no error boundary. Application completely unusable.
